[cron:696799cb-400f-4ac4-9393-6c861584965d Context Monitor] powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw\workspace\skills\miliger-context-manager\scripts\context-monitor.ps1
Current time: Saturday, March 21st, 2026 — 05:40 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-20 21:40 UTC

content.thinking: The context monitor script is running. Let me read the script to understand what it does and follow its instructions.

This script checks context usage. The threshold is 60% by default. The script:
1. Runs `openclaw sessions --json`
2. Checks the main session's token usage
3. Logs the usage percentage
4. Warns if it exceeds the threshold

Let me execute it and see the output.
The context monitor shows that the main session is at 20% context usage (40,794 / 200,000 tokens), which is well below the 60% threshold. Everything is normal, so I just need to reply HEARTBEAT_OK.
